query: Alpe d'HuZes gran fondo cycling Alpe d'Huez

videos.title: l'Alpe d'Huez | A Mythical Mountain
videos.description:
I do not earn any amount of money from my videos. Here is my donation link for those who appreciate my videos: https://paypal.me/MemorableCycling

The best moments of the mythical l'Alpe d'Huez.  l'Alpe d'Huez is a mountain pasture in the Central French Western Alps, in the commune of Huez, which is part of the department of Isère in the region of Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes. Alberto Contador holds the record for the fastest ascent of the climb with 37' 30", achieved during the 2010 Critérium du Dauphiné.

Song 1 John Dreamer - Brotherhood
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MejvKklh4KI

Song 2 Zack Hemsey - See what I've become
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2UeA9Nus9Eg

Song 3 John Dreamer- End of My Journey
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=90PRvlhOLSk

videos.title: Alpe d'Huez - Official Chrono Course 2020 (France) - Indoor Cycling Training
videos.description:
Take your indoor cycling to the next level and bike the world at your own speed:
Dive into an immersive indoor cycling experience with our training app ’Open Road’ for PC. The app lets you take control of the speed of our cycling videos and provides a much better indoor cycling experience than with YouTube. It is compatible with all ANT+ cycling devices including smart trainers, power meters, and speed sensors. Athletes with spinning and exercise bikes without ANT+ compatibility can control the speed manually and enjoy riding with all the important cycling data displayed during the training session.  

Learn more about our training app 'Open Road' and sign up for your free ride on our website: http://bikethe.world

About Alpe d'Huez - Official Chrono Course:
The 21 bends up to Alpe d'Huez does not need much introduction. Its nothing less than the most well-known climb in the world.  It has been immortalized by the Tour de France and has become one of the epicenters for cycling history. Numerous 'battles' between some of the best riders through time has taken place on this climb. This climb is so popular that cyclo tourists from all over the world come to ride it. No wonder it is called the 'Hollywood climb'. But it is not an easy ride and it has many sections with double-digit gradients.  A warm-up before the ride is recommended as the climb starts off with double-digit gradients right away.

You can find this ride on Strava:
https://www.strava.com/segments/683473

Facebook:
Do you like our cycling videos? Then learn more about new rides, our training app 'Open Road', and other cycling related activities by give us a ‘like’ or 'follow' on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/biketheworldvideos/

Strava:
Join our global cycling community and get kudos from fellow cyclists that like to bike the world: https://www.strava.com/clubs/biketheworldcyclingclub

Add your music to the ride:
Most cyclists would agree that the ride to Col du Tourmalet is awesome. But when it comes to music opinions are very mixed. This is why we recommend to mute our soundtrack and add your favorite music. Our soundtrack is compiled from the YouTube Audio Library, and it may not be to the liking of everybody. It is quite simple to add it yourself. Mute the tab and open an extra browser tab. Find a site that offers music (Spotify, YouTube, etc…) and pick the music you like and enjoy the ride... The original sound of the ride has been left out. The natural sound of the surroundings is simply drowned by noise from passing cars, vibrations from the road, wind, and the rider's breathing.

Terms of use:
As a courtesy, this video is free to view for private cyclists at home. Any public and/or commercial use needs a license or membership (contact us at http://bikethe.world for more information). It is not allowed to copy our videos in any way. Likewise, it is not allowed to use our videos outside our YouTube channel or our training app 'Open Road' without written permission. Our videos are protected by international copyright laws.

videos.title: Alpe d'Huez - 1 hour 19 seconds - Full Climb - Cycling Motivation
videos.description:
This is the full climb of Alpe d'Huez - the 21 Bends. If you've ever wondered what its like to cycle up the famous Alpe d'Huez, or if you want to cycle Alpe du Zwift against me, then this is your video. The segment of the climb begins at 2 seconds into the video and the climb is completed in 1 hour and 19 seconds. This was also day 17 of my challenge to cycle Alpe d'Huez every day for 30 days!

Click here for a full video of the climb in: 

1 hour 54 seconds
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ft1_yLlA8T8
1 hour 1 min 14 seconds
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0NMIazuA6Ps
1 hour 2 mins 41 seconds
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cRkeR_CcqQA
1 hour 7 minutes
https://youtu.be/ejVsZkPBd-0

On Strava the 21 bends climb segment is called: Alpe d'Huez 'Vieil Alpe'

You can see my ride on Strava here:

https://www.strava.com/activities/3521299456

PayPal Tip Jar: https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/malcolmmoore0301

If you want to support the local Cycle shop here in Alpe d'Huez, or shop any of the kit I'm wearing, click the link below:

https://www.cyclehuez.com/

I also wear SunGod glasses which are really REALLY good and won't break the bank!
https://sungod.to/PuTYQNDX/

If you're in Alpe d'Huez, let me know in the comments down below, I'm always out riding! Thanks for watching - and please hit that like and subscribe button to help me out.

#AlpedHuez #21bends

videos.title: Grimpée de l’Alpe 2025 – Racing on Alpe d’Huez
videos.description:
Grimpée de l’Alpe is a classic mountain time trial from Bourg d’Oisans to the top of Alpe d’Huez – 13 km, 21 bends, and over 1,000 meters of elevation. It’s a short but intense test, and a perfect lead-up to La Marmotte Granfondo Alpes.

This video covers my climb – including pacing, what worked (and what didn’t), and the real feeling of tackling Alpe d’Huez hard.

Whether you’re preparing for La Marmotte, planning to climb Alpe d’Huez yourself, or just enjoy the atmosphere of mountain cycling, I hope this video can inspire you and that it gives a real sense of what the day is like.

📺 This is my second video, following my La Marmotte story. There’s more to come from future races and training, so if you’d like to follow along:

✅ LIKE if you enjoy the video
✅ SUBSCRIBE for more cycling content – race experiences, training insights, and classic climbs

💬 Feel free to leave questions or comments – I’m happy to share what I’ve learned along the way.

F O L L O W T H E J O U R N E Y:
https://www.instagram.com/keeaanbaang
https://www.tiktok.com/@keeaanbaang
https://www.strava.com/athletes/3758836

Thanks to:
🙏 My dad – for joining me on the trip
🙏 My wife – for the support and patience
🙏 Giant Store Andreas Lund – for keeping the bike in top shape

#GrimpeeAlpe #AlpeDHuez #CyclingVlog #Granfondo #HillClimb #CyclingMotivation #LaMarmotte #RoadCycling #AmateurCyclist
